title: Private Connect
description: Private Connect lets you reach your database from anywhere without exposing it to the public internet.
howItWorksExcerpt:
The client creates a secure path between your server and the hub, then keeps the route alive so database traffic can move through a stable private endpoint.

[[CODEBLOCK_0]]
accessByNameExcerpt: Every shared database gets a stable hostname so apps and teammates can connect by name instead of copying changing IPs into local config files.
